name: ExtensionEvidenceVariable_Characteristic_DefinitionCanonical
title: R5: Defines the characteristic (without using type and value) by a Canonical (new)
purpose:
This extension is part of the cross-version definitions generated to enable use of the
element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.definitionCanonical` as defined in FHIR R5
in FHIR R4.

The source element is defined as:
`EvidenceVariable.characteristic.definitionCanonical` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/EvidenceVariable,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Evidence)`

Across FHIR versions, the element set has been mapped as:
*  R5: `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.definitionCanonical` 0..1 `canonical(http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/EvidenceVariable,http://hl7.org/fhir/StructureDefinition/Evidence)`

Following are the generation technical comments:
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.definitionCanonical` has a context of EvidenceVariable.characteristic based on following the parent source element upwards and mapping to `EvidenceVariable`.
Element `EvidenceVariable.characteristic.definitionCanonical` has no mapping targets in FHIR R4. Typically, this is because the element has been added (is a new element).

element.short: R5: Defines the characteristic (without using type and value) by a Canonical (new)
